message:
fix(tests): add uninlined_format_args allow to more test files

Continue reducing clippy warnings in test code by adding allow attributes
for uninlined_format_args - explicit format strings are often clearer
in test code than inline variables.

Reduces warnings from 428 to 419 (9 additional fixed).
Total reduction: 547 → 419 (128 warnings fixed, 23% reduction).

Part of bd-1bzf.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
